name: Do I need a doctor's note linking my burns to the chemicals at work?

mainEntity.name: Do I need a doctor's note linking my burns to the chemicals at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, a detailed medical report is essential. A doctor must state that your condition was caused by specific workplace chemicals to overcome insurance company claims that your illness is unrelated to your job.
